retrieved_result: voluntary "vol·un·tar·y (vŏl′ən-tĕr′ē)adj.1. Done or undertaken of one's own free will: a voluntary decision to leave the job.2. Acting or done willingly and without constraint or expectation of reward: a voluntary hostage;voluntary community work.3. Normally controlled by or subject to individual volition: v
